reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicios que se encuentra antes de cruzar el puente para llegar a Río Colorado. Antes era importante pero lamentablemente su infraestructura no se actualizó a pesar de estar ubicada en un puntonestrategico. En época de turismo hay que hacer cola durante muchos minutos y los servicios son muy básicos

(Translated by Google)
It's a service station located before crossing the bridge to reach Río Colorado. It used to be important, but unfortunately, its infrastructure hasn't been updated despite its strategic location. During tourist season, you have to wait in line for many minutes, and the services are very basic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dVpXV3VBRRAB

reviews.comment:
